input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.7.4.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.7.4.2
            TITLE: front hoop attachment to a monocoque must obey f.5.7.2 or f.7.8 within 25 mm of any

            CONTENT:
            rule F.7.4.2: Front Hoop attachment to a monocoque must obey F.5.7.2 or F.7.8 within 25 mm of any
F.7.4.2 Front Hoop attachment to a monocoque must obey F.5.7.2 or F.7.8 within 25 mm of any 
bends and nodes that are not at the top center of the Front Hoop

final_answer: Front Hoop attachment to a monocoque must obey F.5.7.2 or F.7.8 within 25 mm of any bends and nodes that are not at the top center of the Front Hoop
